name: int4-qat
description: Gemma-4-E4B-it served from Google's int4 QAT W4A16 checkpoint (google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct, compressed-tensors pack-quantized, group_size 32, Marlin int4). Vision/audio towers stay bf16 via the checkpoint's quant ignore list, so all modalities load. Reproduces the ~95 TPS / PPL ~2.01 leader; quartering text-linear weight bytes is the dominant single-stream decode lever.
